---
title: "GOV51 Problem Set 4"
author: "Brian Jeon"
date: "04/17/2026"
format: pdf
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{changepage}
  - \usepackage{lmodern}
  - \usepackage{anyfontsize}
  - \fontsize{20pt}{20pt}\selectfont
---

# 1 Setup and Data Exploration

Github link \href{https://github.com/brianjeon0722/gov51-ps3}{here}.

## 1.1 Load packages and data
